dct_title_s:
Carte particuliere des costes du Cap de Bone Esperance &c. levée par ordre
          expres des Roys de Portugal sous qui on en a fait la decouverte
dct_alternative_sm: Map of the coast of the Cape of Good Hope
dct_description_sm: Appears in: Atlas Suite de Neptune Francais (1700)
Inset: View of the Cape of Good Hope. Plan of the Cape of Good Hope.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
